name: Revenue by Month
query: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(si.posting_date, "%Y-%m") as "Month:Data:120", SUM(si.grand_total) as "Revenue:Currency:160" FROM `tabSales Invoice` si INNER JOIN `tabConsular Application` a ON a.sales_invoice = si.name WHERE si.docstatus = 1 GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(si.posting_date, "%Y-%m") ORDER BY Month DESC
